title: ICAI Declares CA Foundation, Intermediate, and Final January 2026 Examination Results
content:
# ICAI Declares CA Foundation, Intermediate, and Final January 2026 Examination Results

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne January 2026 session ke Chartered Accountants Foundation, Intermediate, aur Final Examination ke results declare kar diye hain.

Yahaan ek quick summary hai:

*   **CA Final Results:** CA Final Examination ke results pehle hi March 1, 2026 ko announce kar diye gaye the.
*   **CA Foundation & Intermediate Results:** Students ke liye, Foundation aur Intermediate examinations ke results March 8, 2026 ko jaari kiye gaye hain.
*   Aap apna result ICAI ke official result portal par check kar sakte hain. Aapko apna roll number aur registration number enter karna hoga.
*   Individual scorecards ke saath-saath, ICAI ne All India Ranks (AIR) aur pass percentages bhi release kiye hain.

## Read the Official Document
* [Check your results here](https://icai.nic.in/caresult)

*Published on: 11 March 2026*
